expert_tweets.author: FedWatcherPro
expert_tweets.text: Latest CPI data suggests the Fed has room to cut, but they'll want to see at least 2 more months of improvement before acting. June cut is a coin flip at best.

expert_tweets.author: MacroAnalyst
expert_tweets.text: The labor market is finally cooling. This is exactly the data the Fed needs to justify a June cut. Positioning for rate-sensitive assets.

general_tweets.author: randomuser123
general_tweets.text: Fed is definitely cutting in June, trust me bro

general_tweets.author: bearish_trader
general_tweets.text: No way they cut with inflation still above target
